response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including C and C++ from his time at National Instruments, but his recent roles have focused heavily on web, mobile, and cloud technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, React, etc.). While he demonstrates strong technical skills and a focus on quality and secure development, his lack of recent C++ experience and limited exposure to industrial automation, IoT, or secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices per IEC 62443-4-1 may pose a risk for this role.
strengths: Strong C/C++ background from early career at National Instruments
Extensive experience in scalable, high-performance applications (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated commitment to quality, testing, and secure coding practices (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring)
concerns: Lacks recent hands-on C++ development experience (last significant C++ work was ~2015)
No clear evidence of industrial automation, IoT, or message-broker-based large-scale application experience
Limited exposure to IEC 62443 or industrial cybersecurity standards
